message:
🐛 Fix Übersicht widget: use curl instead of fetch, add drag handle (#954)

Übersicht's WebKit context does not support fetch() — widgets must use
shell commands (curl) to fetch data. This rewrites the entire widget code
generator to use the curl + string output pattern that matches the working
clusters widget.

Changes:
- Backend: Add public /api/public/nightly-e2e/runs endpoint (no JWT
  required — data is public GitHub Actions info)
- Code generator: Replace fetch()+dispatch pattern with curl command
  string + render({ output }) pattern across all widget types
- Add unified draggable widget shell: grab handle (⋮⋮), position
  persistence via localStorage, CSS className, open-in-console link
- All card/stat/template widgets now share the same drag + position
  infrastructure matching the working kubestellar-widget-clusters-v1

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
